note: Question asks if a taxi may drive ON A ROAD that has a route-vehicle lane. Source marks option 1 'Має право рухатися' correct (84.8% respondents); ПДР explanation: on such a road taxis are explicitly exempted from the lane prohibition, so a taxi certainly may drive on the road. Our current_answer=2 ('Не має права рухатися') is wrong; correct = our index 1. Official infotech page (pdr.infotech.gov.ua/.../4653) has identical wording but did not expose the key in static HTML.
